228. Where an agent does more than he is authorized to do, and what does
not bound
beyond the scope of his authority cannot be separated from what is within it,
when
excess of the principal is not bound to recognize the transaction.

authority is

A authorizes B to buy 500 sheep for him. B buys 500 sheep and 200 lambs
separable
for one sum of 6,000 Taka. A may repudiate the whole transaction.
